creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nikolai Lifanov from comment #17)
Do you have an example of how it fails though? Does it segfault, or just not run correctly in some way that provides no hint at the underlying problem? Debugging the failure in libc is is proving tricky, so I'm hoping for a conveniently debuggable failure in something other than libc (and hoping that it has the same root cause).
